ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales transaction */,
  "rach_id" TEXT /* Retailer's internal transaction ID */,
  "plu" INTEGER /* Product lookup number (PLU) */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_time" TEXT /* Exact date and time of the sale */,
  "il" REAL /* Item level (e.g., 1 for full item, 0.5 for half item) */,
  "csnj_b" REAL /* Cost of goods sold (COGS) for the product */,
  "wart" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "time_rounded" TEXT /* Rounded time of the transaction for reporting purposes */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the transaction */,
  "minute" REAL /* Minute of the transaction */,
  "time" REAL /* Time in hour and minute format */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction took place */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who conducted the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_plu FOREIGN KEY ("plu") REFERENCES products ("plu"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "plu" INTEGER /* Product lookup number (PLU) */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plu")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the store */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees working in the store */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales generated by the store */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the store details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory clerk, data analyst) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "plu" INTEGER /* Product lookup number (PLU) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product currently in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product (when to reorder) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product (how much to reorder) */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last physically checked */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* Estimated next reorder date based on inventory levels */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last reordered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for reordering the product */,
  "safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_plu FOREIGN KEY ("plu") REFERENCES products ("plu"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
